title: avenula blaui
intro: Avenula blaui, also known as Avenula blauwii, is a perennial grass-like plant in the family Poaceae. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Avenula blaui include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Avenula blaui can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its effects.
